titleStmt.title: SII 10.772: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 772. (A.R. No. 322 of 1922.) ON A ROCK TO THE WEST OF THE VILLAGE OF BURRAKĀYALAKŌṬA, SAME TALUK AND DISTRICT. Ś. 16[1]8. (Īśvara)

summary.p: States that, on the representation of the Reḍḍi and Karaṇam of Burakāyalakōṭa, that the old measuremet of the lands of their village was incorrect, Ināyat-Khān, the Fauzdār of Gurramkoṇḍa, had the lands remeasured with a two-feet pole at the rate of 30 guṇṭas per tūmu. Aurangazēb was the emperor and Hazarat Akā-Khān(?) was Subēdār of Hyderābād.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti jayābhyudaya śālivāhanaśakavaruṣaṁbbuāt the top is engraved the line: julu e[kāri] khānubahadarasāhēbu pāccājaha [danahā]avaraṁgajēbu alaṁgiru
lu 1618 Agu nēṭi yīśvaranāmasaṁvatsara mā¨rgaśira śu . 7lu
[I]1106 nna rōjulu suvālālāyiṁgāru ceppanna dēśālaku
pācchāyi cēstuvuṁḍaṁgānu Amāratu Ayālatupanahā mo
karrabula hajaratu [A]kākāni lavāru tamāmuka śasubēdā
rulajehada haidarābādnu subācēstu vuṁḍaṁgā hērisāyi
bulu yināyatukhānu bipiṇiphaujudāru sarukāru
guraṁkoṁḍḍa tuṁmalagāmayādiśāśānaku
vuṁḍagānu hajēkhānu biduṇidēśamukhu sarakāru guraṁkoṁ
ḍagāruṁnnu sthalakaraṇaṁ . raṁganna modalayina peddavāruṁ śī
malō cellē burakāyalakōṭa reḍḍikaraṇālu tama vūri maḍi
piccakolata Ani phaujudāru yināyatukhānusāhe
bulavāritō telpukone variśalō ciṁtagiṁci pū¨rva
[li?] guṁmasamudraṁ cervu paścimabhāgāna vuttarapu mē
ramu perumāḷlabhaṁḍanu śāsanaṁ vēśina vivaraṁ .
mulku reṁḍḍu Aḍugula ghaḍanu tūmu muvai guṁṭalu
ni¨rnayaṁ śēśināraṁ . mīputrapautrapāraṁparyaṁ
tyagānu Ācaṁdrā¨rkasthāyigānu Anubhaviṁccukoni
sukhāna vuṁṭimi . yiṁduku ślōkaṁ ... kolcu
voḻuguṭaku gōṣpādamunu tīśi yaḍamu viḍava
kunna yeśamu darugu gāna kaulucārikrā ḷa
miga yiṭudharma mācariṁcci danuru ḍāya .
Digital edition of SII 10.772 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
